sprint.goal: Dashboard wiring — Phase 1: 3 working pages by April 17

completedWork.summary: Double-start race condition fully resolved — Phase 1 (flock guard + queue dedup) and Phase 2 (PID-file tracking) both merged.
Studio wizard + execution profiles + swarm template schema — PR #987 merged by Studio EM.
Dashboard wiring Phase 1 — pipeline tooling (seed + health) and Copilot CLI event verification. 50 copilot events confirmed in API from 2 agent types.
Stale PID cleanup — worker.pids now cleaned on worker exit. Resolved P0 stale workers.
AGENTGUARD_WORKSPACE env var resolves correctly in git worktrees.
Conference readiness tooling — demo scenario verification (59 commands, all passing) and pre-flight checklist (13 checks across all hard deps). Cloud API unreachable from readybench — flagged.
Pre-conference governance credibility — created SKILL.md for all 24 disabled agents, re-enabled them. Swarm now 118/120 agents with scope definitions.
Agent Observability MVP spec — 5-question framework, gap analysis, 14-item capability backlog (P0-P3), 3-minute design partner walkthrough script. PR #93 merged.
Dashboard wiring verification — 20-check API-to-UI verification script, wiring spec, 4 cloud issues filed (#410-413). PR #99 merged.
Phase 1 security bug verification — all 3 bugs confirmed fixed (path traversal, JWT revocation, RLS fallback). Created scripts/verify-security-bugs.sh for regression detection.
Stranger test dry-run — automated script covering all 10 checklist items. Local: 6 pass, 0 fail, 3 warn, 2 skip, 2 blocked. PR #111 merged.

currentWork.description: Conference enforcement stories — added --no-verify bypass scenarios to demo script (section 3.5). 5 new scenarios, 64/64 total passing. Demo policy updated with git.commit and git.push --no-verify deny rules.
dependencies: analytics#21 — real enforcement data for production examples (April 3 target)

studio-sr.nextAssignment: #98 (Go kernel fast-path). Blocked by #50 human review.

blockers.progress: PR #414 exists but Build & Test and Vercel API deploy both failing. Needs Cloud squad fix.

blockers.issue: Cloud dashboard pages not deployed — /events, /violations, /runs all 404
blockers.progress: Issue #106 filed with April 7 deadline. Vercel dashboard deploy succeeding (preview exists). Needs route wiring.

Cloud PR #406 (audit log query enrichment) still open, CI status unclear
Issue #50 (Go kernel rewrite impact assessment) needs human review — blocks strategy clarity

agentGuardCloud.title: fix: apply outcome filter to GET /v1/events query

lastQACycle.reason: All systems nominal. Workers 32/32 active. Queue empty. Telemetry healthy. 118/118 agents with SKILL.md. Zero cron collisions.
